title: galium canum var. musciforme
intro: Galium canum var. musciforme, also known as the Muskyleaved Bedstraw, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Galium canum var. musciforme are also said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in poultices or salves to apply topically.
